author: cryptowolf0346
content:
Thanks for the PR, this is really helpful for getting alignment ahead of glamsterdam-devnet-6.

The change to charge CREATE/CREATE2 upfront and then refund on exit makes the execution flow easier to reason about, especially in terms of when costs are incurred vs released.

I’ll take a closer look at the interaction with EIP-7928 and any edge cases around nested create frames / failure paths, but overall the direction looks clearer from a gas accounting standpoint.

Appreciate you doing this.
